backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining EnrollmentApplication and StudentQuestion types with functions to submit and retrieve applications and questions, storing them in Lists with timestamps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: burgundy/white color scheme redesign across all components and addition of an interactive Google Maps location section.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their burgundy-themed styling, form functionality, and component structure.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind layers defining OKLCH color system variables for burgundy and white theme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the COBAD 35 website.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component rendering all page sections in order: HeroSection, AboutSection, LocationMap, EnrollmentForm, QuestionsForm, ContactButtons, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Section displaying four benefit cards with icons, images, and descriptions in burgundy theme, plus an additional info section about the school's mission.
frontend/src/components/ContactButtons.t: Fixed floating buttons in bottom-right corner for WhatsApp and Instagram contact with deep linking functionality.
frontend/src/components/EnrollmentForm.t: Enrollment form with validation, burgundy styling, grade level selection, and success message that submits application data to backend via custom hook.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with burgundy background displaying school info, contact details, hours, copyright, and caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with background image, burgundy gradient overlay, white text, school branding, and smooth-scroll buttons to enrollment and about sections.
frontend/src/components/LocationMap.tsx: Displays an embedded Google Maps iframe showing the location of COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías with a link to open in Google Maps and styled with burgundy theme colors.
frontend/src/components/QuestionsForm.ts: A form component for submitting questions with validation, using React Query mutation hook to submit data to the backend, and displays a success message with school branding after submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for submitting and fetching applications and questions data through the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a burgundy/white color scheme with light and dark mode variants using OKLCH color space, including custom CSS variables for theming.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom burgundy colors, typography, container queries, animations, and design tokens using OKLCH color format.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking features for COBAD 35 school website including hero section, enrollment forms, contact integration with WhatsApp/Instagram, and burgundy/white color scheme. Contains architectural notes about static web page with client-side forms and direct social media integration.
